finding: On Windows, retained sealed runner builds intermittently fail after build-onefile-release when writing release/atm-root-drop/release-manifest.json with UNKNOWN open error.
expectedBehavior: npm run build should write release manifests atomically or retry transient Windows file access failures so runner-sync closeback does not require a manual rerun.
evidenceOrRepro: Observed during ATM-GOV-0199 and ATM-GOV-0200 runner-sync builds. Command: ATM_RETAIN_RELEASE_ARTIFACTS=1 npm run build. Error: UNKNOWN: unknown error, open 'C:\\Users\\User\\AI-Atomic-Framework\\release\\atm-root-drop\\release-manifest.json'. Immediate retry succeeded both times.
followUp: Add a focused task to harden scripts/run-sealed-runner-build.ts writeBuildMetadataToReleaseManifests with retry/atomic write behavior and a Windows regression fixture.
